description: Can't speak highly enough about Funnel Science and the team there. Great product and well worth the price (which is modest in comparison to many other platforms).
author: Jake P.
pros: Super easy to use, and most importantly, allowed for us to provide oversight and training for the sales staff despite the fact that the corporate staff is all remote.
cons: Takes a bit of time to get everyone on the sales side to work the system.

review_title: Best Marketing & Sales CRM of ALL TIME
description: Funnel Science is the best marketing and CRM company I think we ever could have found, honestly. Everything is in ONE place, and they even integrate with things like our emails so that we aren't spending hours copying and pasting lead communications. It's seamless, and their customer service is incredible.
author: Andrea K.
pros: The transparency is key. We know everything that is happening at all times, down to the pennies in what we're spending and what we're getting in return.
cons: Anything that we haven't been fond of has been user-interface, but theres nothing we haven't disliked about Funnel Science, and when we mention the update that we think would be best, they almost always implement what we need for our CRM, custom to us.

review_title: Funnel science is one of the best
author: Sven H.
pros: This software gives you the ability to use a marketing team to your avantage and take over the whole market with the adjustments and comparisson the software gives you.
cons: I can't say a bad thing and might consider paying the full version.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Funnel Science has been the all inclusive solution for small business owner. We are getting better results everyday and the [SENSITIVE CONTENT] has been hands on and responsive/effective support our team with learning the tool and generate consistent leads. We highly recommend Funnel Science.
author: Linh N.
pros: Funnel Science tool provides a seamless integration for call tracking, CRM, AB testing. [SENSITIVE CONTENT] is very professional, efficient and provide our team with immediate boost in leads. We highly recommend Funnel Science services to small business owners!
cons: It will take a little bit to learn the tool just like any other new tool. But it worth the investment to fully bring our sale team up to speed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very professional, you get a fantastic ROI, and the experience has a unique personal touch.
description: I've been working with Rep. at Funnel Science for the past 6 months. I contacted them after seeing one of their instruction manuals on Youtube on how to better use Google Adwords. Once Rep. took over our Adwords campaigns 2 things happened: 1. He managed to cut our monthly Adwords bills by exactly half (saving us THOUSANDS of dollars) and 2. We moved up from 1-2 leads a day to 3-4 (after the first month) and now we are getting anywhere between 6-10 LEGIT leads a day just from Adwords. These are insane results in my book and I am very happy I took the chance with them (paying money to a random company I saw on Youtube?!). Today we are working on many advanced strategies involving Bing ads, Facebook and re-marketing. To sum it up, they are very professional, you get a fantastic ROI, and the experience has a unique personal touch.
author: Moses B.
pros: Call recording, lead management, multi phone lines management, ads budget management and reporting
cons: Nothing yet, would update once something comes up

description: [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and the team are marketing professionals.
author: John W.
pros: Funnel Science is so much more than the software. The software is an integrated part of the best end to end digital marketing process I have seen in over two decades. Where can you engage a world-class marketing team combined with a software technology that provides analytics and leads management all focused on the single objective, increase revenue? I used tier-one marketing agencies for over 35 years and every CRM system on the planet but never the best of breed under one roof. The bottom line, using the Funnel Science end to end solution, a unique combination of technology and talent increases sales volume.
cons: There was nothing we found that we did not like.

description: The experience has been amazing! I've worked directly with [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] for several days to build my campaign. He has so much knowledge and understanding on how to design the marketing ads. This has been a easy setup that has worked tremendously!!! The returns in just the first 3 days are much much higher than we expected!!! Thank you Funnel Science and a special thank you to [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN]!
author: Aaron L.
pros: The best thing with the software is how fast and easy it is reach out to hundreds of prospects in a short amount of time. Before using this software my limitations were physical tasks against time! All of that is no longer a concern which has freed me up to actually speak with Customers and turn in Contracts.
cons: The software is very and user friendly. As of right now there is nothing that we don't like.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This is one of the most user-friendly Sales Software that I have ever encountered.
author: Marc H.
pros: Im 42 years old and I'm not really into all the techie stuff, But this software is very user-friendly, customizable, it tracks every lead that comes in from Facebook, Google ads, bing ads, any ads, emails, phone calls etc, so I know exactly which ads and keyword's are working and most importantly which ads and keywords that are not working and where I should shift my advertising budget. The software records sales calls coming in and going out and it has voice dictation Its mobile friendly for an iPhone or iPad. it sends you text alerts when you miss a call. The Customer serviced and support with Funnel Science is hands down the best I have experienced and I have been sold and used some of the big name softwares in the industry that promise you the moon and stars then after I purchased the software I felt like I was hung out to dry. Funnell Science software has saved me at least 25% of the time that I have wasted on other Sales software and it has saved me 1/3 of my advertising budget compared to last year and I get better quality leads.

description: The leads have been great and we are making sales. Their funnel software is pretty awesome and helps us track, manage and close the leads coming in. Without that, we would have no system to manage all the leads, track quality, and manage the sales funnel. I've worked with a lot of marketing companies, these guys are legit and really great at what they do.
author: Kimberly W.
pros: It helps manage all the leads, track quality, and manage the sales funnel quickly.
cons: I have not found anything to complain about.

review_title: Funnel Science is a very impressive online advertisement tool!
author: Emeka O.
pros: It is very user friendly and very easy to learn. Their team really works well with clients to see their business grow.
cons: Growth and improvement might be slow at first, but it's totally worth it when the spurt kicks in.
author_profession: Ambassador for The Technology Innovation Scholars Program

description: I am absolutely "Mind Blown"! I have been working for my entire professional career with all manner of crm, tracking, management, and data tools! This program literally combines ten different programs into one easy to use, masterpiece! It is like the ultimate tool for business success! Both thumbs way up to the Funnel Science Team!
author: Eric H.
pros: Easy to use! Great customer service! Eliminates multiple programs!
cons: Brighten up the user dashboard for long days in the saddle.

review_title: The Funnel Science Team works for us!
author: Mike P.
pros: Their self-improving product get's better each week. They are always trying new Keywords & deleting ones that do not generate revenue. Their monthly report is easy to read & you quickly see trends that bring in more Happy Clients. Our retention rate is over 90% on this new business coming in & staying with us year after year.
cons: Their software is fine, Google's Adwords is hard to work with. Seems like they change it so often that it is hard to keep up with.... Lucky Funnel Science stays up on the changes

review_title: Funnel Science has been a tremendous tool for proving ROI for PPC campaigns.
description: We use this product with our clients and we love the education about ROI and sales training that we can now provide with the data collected and shown in the Funnel Science dashboard.
author: Ruth Ann R.
pros: I appreciate all the data being in one dashboard and how the ROI information is displayed. I also love the phone call transcription.
cons: It does require some time to learn the system but once you are up and running it is easy to use. When I have had issues, the team at Funnel Science has been there to guide me.

review_title: This is a true partnership that continues to improve campaign performance!
author: Tiffany H.
pros: The customer service agent and the team provide ensure that our company's goals are constantly at the forefront of every decision. They have worked with us to educate us on opportunities and help explain how we can be better as a team. It's taken a little while to ensure the back end set up is correct, but now that we have momentum, we're on a roll!

author: Yosue V.
pros: Ofrece muy buenas características con funciones muy avanzadas y actualizadas, incluye IA, ML entre otras funciones, como big data, que ayuda mucho con la optimización de las campañas de marketing
cons: No es fácil de usar, requiere cierto conocimiento técnico
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing software able to explain and improve our Google Adwords performance. Worth every penny!
author: John G.
pros: Spending money without tracking it's performance and understanding how to improve it is insane. We came to that realization after talking with the folks at Funnel Science and feel confident now in the money we're dedicating to Adwords.
cons: Looking for a couple more reports to really dive into some of our numbers, but from what I understand they're already on the way.
